nasb.text: “Woe to you, scribes and Pharisees, hypocrites! For you build the tombs of the prophets and adorn the monuments of the righteous,

esv.text: “Woe to you, scribes and Pharisees, hypocrites! For you build the tombs of the prophets and decorate the monuments of the righteous,

cnv.text: “虛偽的經學家和法利賽人哪，你們有禍了！你們建造先知的墓，修飾義人的碑，

ccb.text: “虚伪的律法教师和法利赛人啊，你们有祸了！你们为先知建墓，为义人修碑，并且说，

csbs.text: “经文士和法利赛人哪，你们这些伪善的人有祸了！因为你们建造先知的坟墓，装饰义人的墓碑，
